frontMatter.title: Android Arch's Room - Transaction
frontMatter.summary: Sometimes, we need more than one query to execute in one operation. Let's say you have to replace an item.

prev.title: Android Arch's Room - Relation
prev.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed the basic Room from AAC (Android Architecture Component). In this post, we're gonna explore the how to create a relationship between tables
